items.requirement: Provide deterministic DOCX fixture generation with schema baseline verification.
Map source data into text, table-row, and block bookmark slots.
Produce a rendered DOCX suitable for project-template visual smoke review.

evaluation_criteria: Technical fit and evidence quality are weighted before price in this smoke fixture.
Responses must preserve project-template schema and render-data traceability.
submission_instructions: Submit the generated proposal package and evidence summary before the deadline.
This lightweight fixture is intentionally non-binding and used only for smoke coverage.
